; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-22T15:26:04Z

AFFECT [[1658694193319203921]]
    IMPORT [[7081846004279]] [[180927.180926]]

    TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
            property ~&214620122227&~ use12HourClock: _quicksettingsClockSerifSettings.use12HourClock
            property ~&214620122227&~ clockFontFamily: _quicksettingsClockSerifSettings.clockFontFamily

            ~&6502786168&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _quicksettingsClockSerifSettings
                property ~&6503679477&~ use12HourClock: ~&214625660372&~
                property ~&7083178290016&~ clockFontFamily: ~&"2220042106224364465&~

                ~&7712198086779994&~ {
                    ~&7712874798136519&~: "rmitchellscott.quicksettingsClockSerif"
                    property ~&214620122227&~ use12HourClock: _quicksettingsClockSerifSettings.use12HourClock
                    property ~&214620122227&~ clockFontFamily: _quicksettingsClockSerifSettings.clockFontFamily
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[12542166428983872557]]
    IMPORT [[7082573613689.5972775.6504315758]] [[180922.180921]]

    TRAVERSE [[7711468349764991]]#[[6504254477]] > [[6502786168]] > [[8397788359424131273]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[233718721544006]] > [[6502786168]][.[[7081629735527.254529418434902000]]=[[6504329801]]]

        LOCATE BEFORE [[425121728314878811.15389500557572665857]]#[[6026822765657717152]]
        INSERT {
            ~&14397210151462632996&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: clocks
                ~&233721384511543&~ {
                    ~&214640173127&~: ~&6026822765657717152&~.~&6504027668&~
                    ~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                }
                ~&6504315758&~: ~&7082020628281&~.use12HourClock
                      ? ~&5971598&~.formatTime( new  ~&6502586279&~(), "h:mm AP  ")
                      : ~&5971598&~.formatTime( new  ~&6502586279&~(), "hh:mm  ")
                ~&6503823200&~.~&7082646817675&~: ~&7082020628281&~.clockFontFamily
            }
        }

    END TRAVERSE

END AFFECT

AFFECT [[15410910318338348835]]
    TRAVERSE [[7711468349764991]]#[[6504254477]] > [[8397788359424131273]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[8399784311425937276]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[425121728314878811.214599571833]]#[[254526274719339159]]
        INSERT {
            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _clockFormatPanel
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("12-hour time")
                ~&478136262235079021&~: ~&6504222003&~("Show the quick settings clock in 12-hour (AM/PM) format.")
                ~&7082453764199&~: ~&12858967014938070090&~ {
                    ~&233723734822480&~: ~&7082020628281&~.use12HourClock
                    ~&2132408976983288956&~.~&254542253295368380&~: ~&7082020628281&~.use12HourClock = !~&7082020628281&~.use12HourClock
                }
            }

            ~&6502786168&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _clockFontRow
                property ~&6503679477&~ ~&6504147419&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: 80
                ~&180995&~: ~&6504147419&~ ? 10 : 0

                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ {
                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Clock font")
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                }

                ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                    ~&214646099849&~: 320
                    ~&7082729686082&~: 80
                    ~&254542236275632405&~: _clockFontRow.~&6504147419&~ = !_clockFontRow.~&6504147419&~

                    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"233641003890000&~
                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 2
                    }

                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ {
                        ~&490371291080887915&~: 20
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                        ~&6504315758&~: ~&7082020628281&~.clockFontFamily === ~&"16704537207385648980&~ ? ~&6504222003&~("Sans") : ~&6504222003&~("Serif")
                    }

                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502767986&~ {
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&499747351624466981&~: 24
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                        ~&7083172477658&~: _clockFontRow.~&6504147419&~ ? ~&"5203804671957656361&~ : ~&"3792857133054823036&~
                        ~&6504284228&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713132906001613&~.~&7082925185962&~
                    }

                    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
                        ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                        ~&7082729686082&~: _fontOptions.~&7082729686082&~ + 4
                        ~&233748328658231&~: _clockFontRow.~&6504147419&~
                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"233641003890000&~
                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 2
                        ~&180995&~: 10

                        ~&7081293658967&~ {
                            ~&5972374&~: _fontOptions
                            ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ - 4
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&12826966400293002612&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&12826966400293002612&~
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&197100796&~
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&254549367831075482&~: 2

                            ~&3066403218661847378&~ {
                                ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Serif")
                                ~&16486088974086714545&~: ~&214625660372&~
                                ~&7713147376549066&~: ~&7082020628281&~.clockFontFamily === ~&"2220042106224364465&~
                                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                    ~&7082020628281&~.clockFontFamily = ~&"2220042106224364465&~;
                                    _clockFontRow.~&6504147419&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                                }
                            }
                            ~&3066403218661847378&~ {
                                ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Sans")
                                ~&16486088974086714545&~: ~&214625660372&~
                                ~&7713147376549066&~: ~&7082020628281&~.clockFontFamily === ~&"16704537207385648980&~
                                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                    ~&7082020628281&~.clockFontFamily = ~&"16704537207385648980&~;
                                    _clockFontRow.~&6504147419&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
